description: Create a UML Timing Diagram in Wondershare EdrawMax titled 'Secure Entry Timing Analysis' to model a secure door entry system. The diagram must visualize the interaction between three components: 'Card Reader' (states: Idle, Reading), 'Controller' (states: Wait, Process, Grant), and 'Door Lock' (states: Locked, Unlocked). The sequence should show the Card Reader switching to Reading at T=10, the Controller switching to Process at T=15 and Grant at T=25, and the Door Lock switching to Unlocked at T=30 before returning to Locked at T=50. Save the diagram to /home/ga/Documents/entry_timing.eddx and export it as an image to /home/ga/Documents/entry_timing.png.
